name: io.github.luke-fairbanks/broll
description: Content studio MCP for coding agents: BYO keys, deterministic video rendering, draft-first posting

environmentVariables.name: BLUESKY_IDENTIFIER
environmentVariables.description: Optional: Bluesky handle for live posting

environmentVariables.name: MASTODON_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional: Mastodon app token for live posting

environmentVariables.name: X_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional: X consumer key (posting requires funded API credits)

environmentVariables.name: X_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional: X access token (Read and write)
